entries.source: Chat Edit: 'Ran Select-String against agentic_tools.cpp to reveal the first 20 occurrences of params[...] so you can patch the lightweight json usage; results include file paths and line numbers (e.g., params["path"], params["content"], params["overwrite"], etc.).'
